chinese_news.title: 9点1氪｜豆包推出付费后月活减少610万；Anthropic呼吁全球放缓AI开发，警告AI“自我改进”风险；罗永浩卸任锤子软件公司执行董事
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

SpaceX据悉将其IPO的日本融资目标提高至25亿美元

二手房挂牌量回落新房库存下降，楼市供需关系向好

B站宣布启动AI创造公开赛

TOP3大新闻

数据显示，豆包推出付费后月活减少610万 

据全球人工智能市场追踪机构Aicpb.com周三发布的数据显示，在豆包推出订阅选项后，该应用5月份的月活跃用户（MAU）减少了610万，这是自2023年推出以来该应用罕见的下滑。Aicpb.com创始人李邦竹表示：“中国的免费人工智能服务时代还远未结束，所以豆包的商业化可能确实为时过早。” 

有分析人士认为，字节跳动过早地将盈利模式商业化，可能会使其在中国竞争激烈的消费人工智能市场中失去领先地位。此前，其旗舰聊天机器人豆包在试水付费订阅模式后流失了数百万用户。（南华早报）

Anthropic

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜日本或通过抛售美债，为创纪录规模的日元汇市干预筹资；俞浩内部发文：未来将继续心无旁骛做实业
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

首关15亿元，英诺科创三期基金持续聚焦早期科技投资

36氪获悉，6月5日，英诺基金宣布旗下英诺科创三期基金完成首轮关账，规模15亿元。该基金聚焦早期科技投资，重点布局前沿科技及人工智能领域。

比特币“金库”公司市值蒸发620亿美元

比特币本周下跌约14%，至四个月低点附近。随着加密货6月5日下午，追觅科技创始人俞浩在公司内部大群发文，表示未来将继续心无旁骛做实业，坚持技术创新，去啃全球最难的市场。（界面）币整体滑坡，数字资产“金库型”公司的股票也持续下挫，其中许多的跌幅远远超过它们所持有的加密货币本身。Artemis的数据显示，这些比特币金库公司的完全稀释股票总市值，已从去年10月初的近期顶点近1340亿美元，降至约720亿美元，也就是减少了620亿美元。Tokenize Capital管理合伙人Tokenize Capital表示：“随着价格回落，数字资产金库公司正面临一个严峻选择：是债务违约，还是出售资产。被迫抛售已经粉碎了

chinese_news.title: Token大战中，华为云选择了第三条路｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邓咏仪

编辑 | 张雨忻

“在当前国产化算力正在成长的情况下，华为云现在不太在乎Token总量是多少，也不太在乎收入的总量是多少，在乎的是国产化的算力系统所生产出来的Tokens的健康度，并且要代表着生产力提升，而不仅仅是情绪价值。”

6月5日，2026华为云 INSPIRE 创想者大会在上海开幕，华为云CEO周跃峰表示。

他举了个例子：一个人闲来无事在手机上问 AI 一个问题，也会产生 Token，但这种 Token 的价值有多大很难说明。在他看来，衡量一朵云做得好不好，不该强调它跑出了多少万亿 Token，而该看这些 Token 替企业提了多少效率。

chinese_news.title: 中国入境游距离「世界第一」还有多远？
chinese_news.summary:
“曾有外国友人让我推荐中国的最佳旅行目的地，我的回答是：你应该看看中国的山。”

最近的一场入境游研讨会，携程集团联合创始人兼董事局主席梁建章这样回答。在他的表述中，中国有世界最高的山——喜马拉雅；全世界最美的山，则在中国南方最独特的喀斯特地貌——桂林。

与此同时，他正将这份“私藏推荐”转化为全球旅行者的实际行动。

近期，携程集团宣布了一项新的战略计划：未来五年，公司将引入2亿人次的入境游客。

在同期进行的桂林之夜入境游推广活动上，国际影星成龙也以“携程入境游大使”的身份亮相活动现场。当成龙遇上桂林山水，携程决心赋能入境游整体链条的变革正拉开序幕。

chinese_news.title: 探店13家，理想/蔚来/问界如何征服50万客群？
chinese_news.summary:
一周之内，三款“9系”旗舰SUV密集上市，高端新能源市场竞争战况升级。

5月15日，理想发布新一代L9，其中Livis版本搭载800V主动悬架、线控制动、线控转向的全线控底盘，售价50.98万元起。

5月27日，蔚来ES9与问界新M9同天发布。姚明也称“空间大”的蔚来ES9，起售价49.8万元；在高端市场已经破局的问界M9，起售价49.98万元。

冲击50万元级的高端市场，似乎已成为头部新能源车品牌的共识。这背后是战略需要，也是直接的财务驱动。

2026年一季度，理想汽车销量同比增长，但由于70%订单为L6、i6等入门车型。销量结构的下沉，让理想这家最早盈利的新造车公司再度陷入季度亏损。

蔚来则通过定价40万元级的ES8，将主力销售区间从30万元抬升至40万元级别，配合销量增长带来的规模效应，一季度亏损大幅收窄。

在新能源市场多年的配置与价格内卷下，平价入门车型的利润空间已日益稀薄。

新势力品牌纷纷向50万元级突围，不仅是品牌定位的向上攀登，更是关乎企业生

chinese_news.title: 微信AI对手机厂商打开一道窄门｜焦点分析
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王毓婵 梁键强

编辑｜张雨忻

昨日，腾讯客服回应称，微信正在与华为、小米、荣耀、OPPO、vivo等手机厂商合作推出A2A助手能力，目前已有多家厂商完成接入。

“您可以通过对应手机系统的AI助手发起微信音视频通话或向指定好友发送消息。该功能基于A2A（Agent-to-Agent）协作机制，数据安全与隐私通过双重授权机制保障。合作旨在将微信高频沟通功能融入手机系统助手，为您提供更便捷的使用体验。”腾讯客服表示。

与之前字节跳动推出的豆包手机相比，腾讯的微信AI采取了完全不同的技术路径。

以豆包手机为代表的很多 OS 端 AI 助手，走的是 GUI agent（图形界面智能体） 路线——它们像人一样通过“读屏”来识别界面，再通过“模拟点击”去操作微信。

而腾讯此次与手机厂商的合作，采用了A2A（Agent-to-Agent）机制——微信打

chinese_news.title: 前华为员工创业线控底盘，曾参编国标，获松禾、苏高新投资丨36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，线控底盘核心零部件供应商毫秒智控已于近期完成数千万元天使+轮融资，本轮投资方为松禾资本和苏高新融晟。这也是公司成立仅一年以来，继获得厚雪资本天使轮独家投资后，接连完成的第二轮融资。

毫秒智控2025年4月成立于上海，专注于线控转向（SBW）系统及核心电控部件的研发与生产。

毫秒智控的核心竞争力，源于其极度稀缺的团队基因。创始人兼 CEO李杰是线控转向新国标修订的联合牵头人，在集度汽车任职期间作为企业方核心代表，全程深度参与了标准的制定工作，履历完整覆盖上汽、蔚来、华为、集度所代表的传统转型、新势力崛起、科技赋能及前沿探索等产业关键发展阶段。其核心团队在集度时期开发的线控转向系统已完成超5万公里自动驾驶实测，是国内唯一具备该实测里程的团队。

硬氪了解到，线控转向（Steering-By-Wire, SBW）彻底取消了方向盘与转向机构之间的机械连接，完全依赖电信号控制。作为L3级以上高阶自动驾驶的“神经中枢”，其响应速度、操控精度和布局灵活性远超传统电动助力转

chinese_news.title: 硬氪独家 | 唐文斌「原力灵机」并购物流机器人公司，并获智谱、商汤、阶跃等投资
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪独家获悉，具身智能企业「原力灵机」近期完成新一轮融资，资方主要为数家大模型公司，包括智谱、阶跃星辰、商汤科技。此外，华勤、上汽恒旭等产业投资方持续加注。

「原力灵机」是一家通用具身大模型公司，2025年3月由旷视科技联合创始人兼CTO唐文斌创立，团队核心创始成员为旷视科技原班人马。

有意思的是，此次融资也是商汤、旷视这两家曾经的对手，在具身智能的热潮中罕见“会师”；

另外，算上A+轮独家领投的阿里，这也是具身智能赛道罕见同时聚齐国内四家大模型厂商——此前，智谱仅通过Z基金小范围投资具身智能领域，阶跃星辰则几乎未出手具身智能。

而这一集体动作也释放出一个信号，当大模型竞争的主战从T

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC near $60K with institutional sentiment flipped; Saylor (MicroStrategy) signaling continued accumulation despite $390B crypto selloff creates binary reversal setup.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin near $60,000 today vs February: Institutional sentiment has flipped' + Cointelegraph: 'Strategy's Saylor signals BTC buy as preferred dividend pay date vote looms'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Trump administration and Iran reach a nuclear agreement by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: US-Iran ceasefire fragile as Iran fires missiles; Trump signals talks progressing but no deal yet. Market hasn't priced binary resolution on JCPOA-like outcome.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Fragile ceasefire in jeopardy as Iran reportedly fires missiles at Israel' + 'Inside the Obama-era Iran nuclear deal that Trump withdrew from'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum fall below $1,400 by August 31, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut interest rates at least once before September 30, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Israel-Hezbollah tensions escalate to full war by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Israel strikes Beirut days after US-brokered truce; binary geopolitical risk premium rising. Macro traders hedging risk-off trades need pricing.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will ByteDance's Douyin AI assistant (豆包) monthly active users exceed peak levels by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: ByteDance official metrics or third-party app analytics (SensorTower, data.ai) for Douyin MAU
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese AI race moving fast; 36Kr reports 6.1M MAU drop post-paywall suggests monetization friction, but recovery trajectory unpriced. Crypto/VC audience tracking China AI moat.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr exclusive — 'Douyin's paid model loses 6.1M monthly active users' surfaces before English media; indicates model adoption headwinds in competitive AI assistant space.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will semiconductor resin shortage push consumer electronics prices up by at least 3% YoY before September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CPI subcategory (Electronics and Appliances) via US Bureau of Labor Statistics; confirmed by supply-chain analysts (Gartner, IDC)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC flagged resin shortage but market hasn't priced input-cost inflation into semis/devices. Affects NVDA supply chain sentiment.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Inflation inside the electronics you buy may soon become a bit more sticky' — resin shortage tied to component pricing power.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic's AI safety slowdown proposal gain adoption by major AI labs (OpenAI, Google, Meta) by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Public commitments / policy statements from OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Meta AI; Anthropic's own published agreements
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Anthropic calling for global AI development slowdown under-reflects regulatory/reputation risk for competitors. Market hasn't priced consensus-building effort.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr — 'Anthropic urges global slowdown in AI development, warns of AI self-improvement risks' — appears before English media consensus; indicates safety narrative shift.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Japan's yen intervention and potential US Treasury selling push USD/JPY below 145 by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: BOJ official FX intervention logs + Fed Treasury holdings data + real-time USD/JPY spot (CME futures settlement)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reports Japan eyeing sale of US debt to finance yen defense; macro traders haven't fully priced BoJ ammunition depletion.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr — '日本或通过抛售美债' (Japan may sell US Treasuries) — China-sourced, geopolitical yen carry-unwind signal before Western FX desks fully react.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Tesla's stock outperform S&P 500 by 15% or more in H2 2026 (July 1 – December 31)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance / Bloomberg Terminal closing prices; TSLA total return vs SPY total return
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump administration scrutiny and Delta-United Pacific turf war signal broader transport/EV volatility; TSLA guidance credibility questioned but upside optionality ignored.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Trump storms out after being challenged' + Delta-United competition signal suggests regulatory risk appetite shift; EV sentiment de-correlated from macro.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin accumulation by smart money (Saylor, institutions) despite technical capitulation creates asymmetric long into Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'Strategy's Saylor signals BTC buy as preferred dividend pay date vote looms'
CoinDesk: 'Institutional sentiment has flipped' from February lows
Bitcoin 'most oversold since 2020 crash' — technical reversal setup
investment_theses.counter_view: Nasdaq correlation + tech IPO uncertainty + Iran geopolitical tail risk could extend capitulation; $50K not impossible if crypto contagion spreads.
investment_theses.expression: BTC perpetual futures (long) or cash BTC accumulation; hedge with short Nasdaq-100 (QQQ) put spreads to express institution-led recovery thesis.

investment_theses.thesis: US-Iran nuclear deal by EOY 2026 likely; risk premium in oil and geopolitical hedges (VIX calls, gold) unjustifiably high.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump signals talks progressing despite missile exchange
BBC: Zelensky's European allies setting peace conditions — indicates broader Trump administration appetite for deals
Ceasefire existed April 2026; no formal collapse yet despite 'fragile' framing
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran hardliners may reject any Trump deal; missile escalation could spiral before diplomacy gains traction. Israel strikes Beirut suggest military option still live.
investment_theses.expression: Long crude oil (short-term pain hedge: sell July 2026 WTI call spreads); long gold (GLD) as insurance against deal failure; synthetic long on dollar (DXY) if deal confidence builds.

investment_theses.thesis: Ethereum redemption trade: oversold below $1.5K with tokenization narrative (Abra, wall-street adoption) accelerating; risk/reward asymmetric for Q3 rebound.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: ETH 13-month low; Zcash bug creates temporary flight-to-safety
CoinDesk: 'Abra's Bill Barhydt says Wall Street's next crypto bet is tokenization'
Ethereum Foundation departures framed as non-crisis (Joe Lubin), suggesting continuity in staking/L2 growth
investment_theses.counter_view: BTC dominance rising; ETH underperforming structurally if macro risk-off continues. Tokenization narrative premature without clear institutional wire flows.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio (buy ETH, short BTC pair trade); small allocation to 3-6 month OTM ETH calls ($2K strike) to capture rebound gamma.

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese AI competitiveness (Douyin, Huawei Cloud native token economy) faces monetization wall; Anthropic safety narrative may accelerate Western AI moat consolidation.
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr exclusive — Douyin paid tier loses 6.1M MAU; model sustainability questioned
FLAG: 36Kr — Huawei Cloud (6月5日 华为云 INSPIRE) pivots to 'health of domestic tokens' vs. Western LLM scale race
Anthropic safety call gains narrative traction; regulatory tailwind for OpenAI/Google (already scaled)
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese gov may subsidize AI development to prevent foreign dependence; regulatory crackdown on Western AI possible (EU, US antitrust). Douyin pivot to efficiency may succeed.
investment_theses.expression: Overweight Nvidia (NVDA) and Broadcom (AVGO) on Western AI capex durability; short Chinese AI names (Baidu ADRs if liquid); stay long BTC as macro hedge.

investment_theses.thesis: Supply-chain input inflation (resin shortage, semis) unpriced in consumer expectations; CPI persistence into H2 2026 forces Fed to hold rates longer, supporting USD and real assets.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Resin shortage may push up electronics prices'
36Kr: Douyin monetization friction signals demand weakness, not supply relief
Bitcoin, crypto volatility suggests macro uncertainty — real rates may reprice higher
investment_theses.counter_view: Supply chains normalize faster than expected; Fed cuts anyway due to labor weakness. Energy deflation could offset goods inflation.
investment_theses.expression: Long 10Y US Treasury yields (short TLT or long ZF); long DXY (dollar strength on carry unwind risk); short technology growth (QQQ) vs. staple rotation (XLP).
